Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Nealco Electrical Services, LLC to get the job done right.

“Nealco Electrical was fantastic! Our old panel was struggling to keep up with our new appliances. They upgraded it quickly and professionally. The electrician, David, explained everything clearly and answered all my questions. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Electrical Panel Upgrade
Mar 15, 2025

“I had a few outlets that weren't working properly, and Nealco Electrical fixed them in no time. The electrician was on time, courteous, and efficient. The pricing was fair and transparent. I'll definitely use them again for any future electrical needs.”

John B. Outlet Repair
Feb 28, 2025

“We hired Nealco Electrical to install recessed lighting in our kitchen, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The lighting is beautiful and has completely transformed the space. The installation was done quickly and professionally. Great job!”

Emily K. Lighting Installation
Jan 10, 2025

“After a recent lightning storm, I decided to invest in whole-house surge protection. Nealco Electrical installed the system quickly and efficiently. I now have peace of mind knowing that my electronics are protected from power surges. Great service!”

Robert S. Whole-House Surge Protection
Dec 20, 2024

“Nealco Electrical installed a new ceiling fan in our bedroom. The electrician was professional and efficient. The fan works great and has made a big difference in the comfort of the room. I would recommend Nealco Electrical to anyone needing electrical services.”

Jessica L. Ceiling Fan Installation
Nov 15, 2024

“Installed my Level 2 charger without a hitch. Showed up on time, knew his stuff, and got it done quickly. Now I can charge my Tesla at home without any problems. Will call them again.”

Michael T. EV Charger Installation
Oct 1, 2024
Nealco Electrical Services, LLC

Trusted electrical contractor professionals serving Austin, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
